ensures.text: exists a: int | 1 <= a && a < n :: exists b: int {:trigger Gcd(a, b)} | a < b && b <= n :: Gcd(a, b) == result
forall a: int | 1 <= a && a < n :: forall b: int {:trigger Gcd(a, b)} | a < b && b <= n :: Gcd(a, b) <= result
exists a: int | 1 <= a && a < n :: exists b: int {:trigger Gcd(a, b)} | a < b && b <= n :: Gcd(a, b) == result
forall a: int | 1 <= a && a < n :: forall b: int {:trigger Gcd(a, b)} | a < b && b <= n :: Gcd(a, b) <= result

foralls.ensures: forall bi: int {:trigger Gcd(ai, bi)} | ai < bi && bi <= n :: Gcd(ai, bi) <= result
